/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/ParagonApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/ParagonInit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/config/ParagonConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/event/ParagonEventManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/event/ParagonEventTypeGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/scene/ParagonScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/scene/ParagonSceneInWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/scene/ParagonSceneIntro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/scene/ParagonSceneLoadingScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/scene/ParagonSceneMainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonStateInWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonStateIntro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonStateLoadingScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonStateMainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/state/ParagonStateManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/system/ui/UIEntityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParagonApp.dir/system/ui/UILuaAPI.cpp.o -o ParagonApp  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" ../common/libcommon.a libcore.so ../util/libutil.a -llua5.4 -llua5.4
